cards.rules_text:
Choose up to two —
• Exile target artifact or creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.
• Return target artifact or creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

Choose one —
• Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
• Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

Choose one —
• Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature.
• Destroy target artifact.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Rage boiled in the dreamblade's blood. He had trained to control his emotions, but in one destructive moment, he set them free.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose one —
• Target opponent exiles a creature they control.
• Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. Exile that card.

Choose one —
• Counter target artifact or enchantment spell. If a spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard.
• Counter target activated or triggered ability.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“How do you expect to defeat me when you can barely [/i]comprehend[i] me?”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose one —
• Target player gains 3 life.
• Prevent the next 3 damage that would be dealt to target creature or player this turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]An elixir as old as time itself, serving to heal past wounds and fortify against future ones.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose one —
• Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.
• Regenerate target creature. [i](The next time that permanent would be destroyed this turn, it isn't. Instead tap it.)[/i]
• Counter target spell that targets you.

Choose one —
• Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.
• Creatures you control get +0/+2 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]A safe badger is a happy badger.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters or dies, choose one —
• Draw a card, then discard a card.
• Shuffle up to four target cards with mana value 3 or greater from your graveyard into your library.

Choose one —
• Draw three cards.
• Return up to two target creatures to their owner's hands.

Flying
Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, choose one —
• This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
• Exile this creature. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.
• Scry 1.

When this creature dies, choose one —
• Target creature an opponent controls gets -1/-1 until end of turn.
• Create a Treasure token. [i](It's an artifact with “{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.”)[/i]

Choose one —
• Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
• Return two target creature cards that share a creature type from your graveyard to your hand.
cards.flavor_text: [i]So long as a species is remembered, it can never truly disappear.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose up to two —
• Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

Choose one —
• Destroy target artifact.
• Change the target of target spell or ability with a single target.
• One or two target creatures can't block this turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Lose focus, and it's not just your concentration that breaks.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Create a 1/1 green and white Citizen creature token.
• Create a Treasure token. [i](It's an artifact with “{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.”)[/i]

Choose one —
• Target creature gets +4/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.
• Two target creatures each get +2/+0 and gain trample until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Some small villages still exist in the Dreamscape. For obvious reasons, they are all nomadic.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose one —
• Target nonattacking creature gains deathtouch and reach until end of turn. Untap it.
• Target attacking creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn.

When this creature enters, choose one —
• Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.
• Proliferate. [i](Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)[/i]

When this creature enters, choose one —
• Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.
• You gain 3 life.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“The city stifles my music, so I bring it here, where it is truly appreciated.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Scry 2.
• You gain 3 life.
• Exile another target creature you own. Return it to the battlefield under your control at the beginning of the next end step.

Escalate—Tap an untapped creature you control. [i](Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.)[/i]
Choose one or more —
• Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater.
• Destroy target enchantment.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature target player controls.

Choose one —
• Choose a nonland card name. Opponents can't cast spells with the chosen name until your next turn.
• Choose target nonland permanent. Until your next turn, it can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated.

Choose three. You may choose the same mode more than once.
• Create a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance.
• Exile target enchantment.
• You gain 5 life.

Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, choose one —
• Create two 1/1 white Human Soldier creature tokens.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

When this creature enters, choose one —
• Remove all counters from target creature. It can't have counters put on it for as long as this creature remains on the battlefield.
• Target opponent loses all counters. That player can't get counters for as long as this creature remains on the battlefield.

Kicker {2}{U}{U} [i](You may pay an additional {2}{U}{U} as you cast this spell.)[/i]
Choose one. If this spell was kicked, choose any number instead.
• Return up to two target creatures to their owners' hands.
• Scry 2, then draw two cards.
• Target player creates an X/X blue Illusion creature token, where X is the number of cards in their hand.

Flying
At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose up to one —
• Tap target creature.
• Target creature doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step.

Choose one —
• Return all creature tokens to their owners' hands.
• Return all nontoken creatures to their owners' hands.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]Our greatest challenges are the ones our 
own minds create.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
This creature can't be blocked.
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, choose one that hasn't been chosen —
• Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature.
• Draw a card.
• This creature becomes a copy of another target creature you control.

When this creature enters, choose one —
• Create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying.
• Return another target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
• Draw a card.

Choose one —
• Each player draws X cards.
• Each player mills X cards.
cards.flavor_text: [i]A Lotus Eater's gaze is both difficult to meet and difficult to break.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose one —
• Target creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn.
• Creature tokens get -2/-2 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“You're going to wish you were never born... Oh wait. You won't have been.”
— Kyrie, Fear's Right Hand[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose one —
• Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
• Put a card you own from outside the game into your hand.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Sometimes, all you need is just one last piece.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one —
• Each player with exactly 13 life loses the game, then each player gains 1 life.
• Each player with exactly 13 life loses the game, then each player loses 1 life.

Escalate—Discard a card. [i](Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.)[/i]
Choose one or more —
• Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose an instant or sorcery card from it. That player discards that card.
• Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.
• Target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

Kicker {2}{B}{B} [i](You may pay an additional {2}{B}{B} as you cast this spell.)[/i]
Choose one. If this spell was kicked, choose any number instead.
• Target opponent discards two cards.
• Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
• Destroy target creature with mana value 3 or less.

Whenever a Swamp you control enters, choose one —
• You draw a card and you lose 1 life.
• This creature deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“You ever feel like you're being watched?”
— Amari, novice dreamblade, last words[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Haste
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Discard a card, then draw a card.
• Create a Treasure token.
• Create a Wicked Role token attached to target creature you control. [i](If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1. When this Aura is put into a graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life.)[/i]

Escalate {1} [i](Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.)[/i]
Choose one or more —
• Target player discards all the cards in their hand, then draws that many cards.
• Collective Defiance deals 4 damage to target creature.
• Collective Defiance deals 3 damage to target opponent or planeswalker.

Whenever this creature attacks or becomes the target of a spell an opponent controls, choose one —
• This creature deals 3 damage to each opponent.
• Exile the top two cards of your library. Choose one of them. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

This spell can't be copied.
Choose up to two —
• Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.
• Copy target creature spell you control. The copy gains haste and “At the beginning of the next end step, sacrifice this token.”
cards.flavor_text: [i]“The Dreamsun gives power to everyone. This one's just for me.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose one —
• Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
• Target creature you control gains menace and haste until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“Leave no earth unscorched. Leave no foes unslain.”
— Estol, Ousted Nightlord[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose one —
• Until end of turn, you gain control of target creature and it gains haste.
• Sacrifice a creature. Grab the Reins deals damage equal to that creature's power to any target.
Entwine {2}{R} [i](Choose two if you pay the entwine cost.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]There's always somebody else pulling the strings.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
[i]Alliance[/i] — Whenever another creature you control enters, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn —
• Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
• Create a tapped Treasure token. [i](It's an artifact with “{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.”)[/i]
• You gain 2 life.

{G}: Choose one. Activate only once each turn.
• Until end of turn, this creature becomes a Rhino with base power and toughness 4/4 and gains trample.
• Until end of turn, this creature becomes a Bird with base power and toughness 2/2 and gains flying.
• Until end of turn, this creature becomes a Plant with base power and toughness 0/8.

Trample
This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Double the number of +1/+1 counters on Voracious Hydra.
• Voracious Hydra fights target creature you don't control.

Choose four. You may choose the same mode more than once.
• Create a 2/2 Citizen creature token that's all colors.
• Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.
• Proliferate. [i](Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)[/i]
• You gain 4 life.

Choose one —
• Search your library for a creature or land card and reveal it. Put it onto the battlefield tapped if it's a land card. Otherwise, put it into your hand. Then shuffle.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.
• Exile target artifact or enchantment.

Kicker {2}{G} [i](You may pay an additional {2}{G} as you cast this spell.)[/i]
Choose one. If this spell was kicked, choose any number instead.
• Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature.
• Target player gains X life, where X is the greatest power among creatures they control.
• Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

Reach, trample
When this creature enters, choose two —
• Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
• Target player gains 5 life.
• Create a 4/4 green Rhino Warrior creature token.
• Put a shield counter on a creature you control. [i](If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)[/i]

Choose two —
• Target player gains 7 life.
• Put target noncreature permanent on top of its owner's library.
• Target player shuffles their graveyard into their library.
• Search your library for a creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

Choose one —
• Search your library for up to two creature cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.
• Put up to two creature cards from your hand onto the battlefield.
Entwine {2} [i](Choose both if you pay the entwine cost.)[/i]

Choose two —
• Incendiary Command deals 4 damage to target player or planeswalker.
• Incendiary Command deals 2 damage to each creature.
• Destroy target nonbasic land.
• Each player discards all the cards in their hand, then draws that many cards.

Choose one —
• Gain control of all creatures with power 4 or greater until end of turn. Untap those creatures. They gain haste until end of turn.
• Gain control of all creatures with power 3 or less until end of turn. Untap those creatures. They gain haste until end of turn.

Cast this spell only during your turn and only during combat.
Choose one —
• Creatures you control gain double strike until end of turn.
• Untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.
Entwine {1}{R} [i](Choose two if you pay the entwine cost.)[/i]

At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one that hasn't been chosen —
• This enchantment deals 4 damage to any target and you gain 4 life.
• Target opponent discards two cards.
• Draw two cards.
• You lose the game.

Choose two —
• Target player loses X life.
• Return target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
• Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn.
• Up to X target creatures gain fear until end of turn. [i](That creature can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or black creatures.)[/i]

Choose one —
• Exile each creature with power greater than the number of cards in your hand.
• Exile each creature with power less than the number of cards in your hand.

Flash
This spell can't be countered.
Whenever you cast a spell, choose up to one —
• Return target spell you don't control to its owner's hand.
• Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

Choose two —
• Counter target spell.
• Return target permanent to its owner's hand.
• Tap all creatures your opponents control.
• Draw a card.

{1}, Exile an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard: Choose one —
• Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {2}.
• This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
• Tap target creature.
• Untap target creature.

[i]Landfall[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, choose one —
• Create a 2/2 white Cat Beast creature token.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Those creatures gain vigilance until end of turn.

Choose two —
• Destroy all artifacts.
• Destroy all enchantments.
• Destroy all creatures with mana value 3 or less.
• Destroy all creatures with mana value 4 or greater.

Offspring {2} [i](You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)[/i]
Whenever you attack, choose one —
• Create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token that's tapped and attacking.
• Attacking creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
